remarks: Nearly new 1 bedroom in the center of Norwalk! - Stunning kitchen with granite counters and stainless steel appliances - Hardwood floors! - 1 car attached garage - Good bedroom and closet space - Private washer / dryer in-unit - Gas heat & central air - Common patio space - Walk to multiple restaurants at The Waypointe! - Easy access to SoNo Collection Mall, downtown South Norwalk, Metro North, shopping, and highways - No pets!
